tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I want water. I wanted water. Let me tell you. Let's start. I would like to meet you.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I can swim. You should drink more water. May I come in? We must follow the rules. He wants a new job.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह एक नई कार चाहता था।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision + Speaking Practice (Days 11-19) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Let's eat something. We would like to have a coffee. She can speak English. We should work hard.
